executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
These are FRONTEND browser tests for the /preview page. The page renders ALL widget variants as images.

CRITICAL DETAILS:
1. The page is at /preview - it's a public page, no auth needed.
2. The page has a dark background (#08080a) with light text.
3. Widget images are rendered via WidgetImage components which produce img elements.
4. The images are loaded from the /api/screenshot endpoint - they may take time to render since each calls Puppeteer.
5. USE LONG TIMEOUTS - wait up to 60 seconds for the page to fully load since it renders 45+ screenshots.
6. Section headings contain the layout name like "Contextual Hero (2×2)", "Bento Box (2×4)" etc.
7. To count images in a section, find the section heading then count img elements that follow it until the next section.
8. For image load verification, check img.naturalWidth > 0 or img.complete === true.
9. The page may lazy-load images - scroll through the entire page before counting.
10. Timeline + Tasks has 5 sub-sections with headings containing "Inline", "Pinned", "Nested", "Floating", "Progress".
